_doc: Wood Worker Base — small brown cabin where the wood-worker spawns. PR #4.2: replaces the single shared worker-pad-active. OnSpawn fires once on creation and emits one wood-worker just south-east of the cabin so it walks out with a clear path to the trees. Offset [2, 0, 2] puts the worker at the corner (~0.4u clear of the 1.6u half-extent collider in both axes) so direct steering toward south-side trees doesn't graze the cabin's bbox.
